description: A black and white reproduction of a Chinese painting depicting Sakyamuni Buddha seated in meditation posture on a lotus-like cloud or seat. He wears flowing robes and has a topknot. A large circular halo or moon disc glows behind his head. His hands are in a meditative mudra. The style is characteristic of classical Chinese Buddhist painting with fluid brushwork and delicate shading.

_meta.title: Black and white reproduction of a portrait of Sakyamuni
